subject: Cannot login to my account
description: I have been trying to login for the past hour but keep getting 'Access Denied'. I tried resetting my password but the reset email never arrived. This is urgent as I need access for work.

subject: Invoice overcharge on last billing cycle
description: My invoice for November shows a charge of $299 but I am on the $99/month plan. Please review and issue a refund for the difference. This is the second time this has happened.

subject: App crashes on startup — production down
description: Since the last update (v2.4.1) the mobile app crashes immediately on startup with a null pointer exception. This affects all our users in production. Traceback: NullPointerException at MainActivity.onCreate(). Steps to reproduce: install v2.4.1, open app.

subject: Please add dark mode support
description: It would be really nice to have a dark mode option in the settings. Many users have been requesting this as a wishlist item. No rush, just a suggestion for the next feature cycle. Would be a great enhancement.

subject: Dashboard loading very slowly
description: The analytics dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load when there are more than 1000 records. This performance issue is blocking our daily reporting workflow. Affects all users in our organization. Please fix ASAP.

subject: Two-factor authentication not working
description: I enabled 2FA on my account but the verification codes from the authenticator app are always rejected. I have tried 3 different authenticator apps (Google, Authy, Microsoft). The QR code scans fine but authentication always fails.

subject: Bulk export feature request
description: Could you please add a bulk CSV export feature for all tickets? Currently we can only export one by one which is very time consuming. I would love to have this on the reports page. Would be a great addition to the existing features.

subject: API returns 500 error on POST /users endpoint
description: When sending a POST request to /api/v1/users with a valid JSON body, the server returns a 500 Internal Server Error. This is a regression introduced in the latest deployment. Error occurs 100% of the time. Blocking our integration development.

subject: Cancel subscription and request refund
description: I would like to cancel my annual subscription and receive a pro-rated refund for the remaining 8 months. My subscription renews on December 1st. Please process the cancellation and credit my original payment method.

subject: Security vulnerability in file upload
description: I discovered a potential security vulnerability in the file upload endpoint. It appears to accept executable files without validation. This could be exploited for remote code execution. Reporting as a responsible disclosure. Please treat as critical security issue.

subject: Minor typo on the pricing page
description: There is a small typo on the pricing page: 'Montlhy' should be 'Monthly' in the Pro plan section. This is a cosmetic issue and low priority. Just wanted to flag it so it can be fixed when convenient. No rush at all.

subject: Forgot password email not received
description: I requested a password reset email 3 times today but have not received anything. I checked my spam folder as well. My email address is confirmed as liam.harris@finance.biz. Please help me regain access to my account.

subject: Integration with Slack — feature request
description: Our team would really benefit from a native Slack integration that sends ticket notifications to a chosen channel. This would improve our response time. Many of our peers have been requesting this enhancement as well. Please consider adding this.

subject: Data export contains incorrect date formats
description: When exporting ticket data to CSV, all dates are formatted as Unix timestamps instead of human-readable ISO 8601. This is a bug as the previous version exported correctly. Steps to reproduce: go to Reports > Export > CSV. Expected: 2024-01-15T10:30:00. Actual: 1705312200.

subject: Pricing question — Enterprise plan
description: I am evaluating your Enterprise plan for a team of 50 users. Could you provide details on volume discounts, annual vs monthly pricing, and whether custom payment terms are available? Also asking about the cost for additional storage add-ons.
